full_text:
Hu Kang
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Kang. Disobeyed Zhuge Ke’s orders to not arrest Shanyue leaders and was executed. Hu Kang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
